component.name: ShellBar
component.summary: A Ghostty-like terminal with a configurable command toolbar

description.p: ShellBar is a terminal emulator for Linux that adds a programmable command toolbar. Instead of remembering and retyping long commands across monorepos, configure one-click buttons.
Built on Ghostty's VT engine (libghostty-vt) with GTK4 + libadwaita for a dark, modern appearance.

ul.li: Configurable toolbar with command buttons from ~/.config/shellbar/config
Command palette (Ctrl+P) with shell history and PATH search
Inline ghost-text autocomplete from shell history
Terminal search (Ctrl+F) with real-time match navigation
Font zoom (Ctrl+= / Ctrl+-) with zoom level indicator
Configurable button bar position: top / bottom / left / right

description.p: Autocomplete improvements, configurable button bar position, tab animations, resize overlay.
